name: Individual Frozen Lime Cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Line 6 muffin cups with paper baking cups.
2. Place 1 vanilla wafer in the bottom of each cup.
3. Beat cream cheese and powdered sugar at medium speed with an electric mixer until smooth.
4. Stir in milk, lime rind, and juice.
5. Fold in whipped topping; spoon into baking cups.
6. Stand 3 vanilla wafers around the edge of each cup.
7. Freeze until firm.
Makes 6 servings.
